title: Pachchai Vanna Poove Lyrics Vai Raja Vai Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Vai Raja Vai Pachchai Vanna poove song lyrics
Singer : Yuvan
Lyrics : Karky

Ye Pachchai Vanna poove
Siriththu ponaai.
En boomi engum pachchai
Iraiththu ponaai.

Sedi kodigal ellaam
Un mugam paarthaen.
Naan ilai thalaigalodu
En viral koarthaen.

Hey pullin meedhu
Paadham vaikaamal
Selginren pennae,
Un sollai kaetta pinnae.

Hey pachchai Vanna poove
Siriththu ponaai.
En boomi engum pachchai
Iraiththu ponaai.

En kaal ondril mul kutththinaal
Aval mullukku noi paarkkiraal.
Vaai kondu pesaamal
Kaai thaangum maram ondrai
Thaa endru sonnaalae
Enai eerkiraai.

Naan kilai ondril
Undhan Kai paarkiren.
Adhan oraththil lesaa
Keeralgal kandaal
En nenjil vazhikolgiren.

Idhaya suvar mele
Un niram paarthaen.
Hey naanum maramaaga
Varam kaetaen.
Yaen varam ketaen.

En veedengum kaadaakkinaai
En kaattukul kizhi aaginai.
Kizhi ondrin keechchaagi
ilai ondrin moochchaagi
Mugil ondril pechchaagi
Enai velgiraai

Onn koottangal
Ingar yeraalamaai.
Naan neerattru nindren
Nee vandhu veelndhaai
EnVaerengum dhaaraalamaai.

Mazhai nanaiththa pinne
Naan silirkkindren.
En nenjukulle yedho
Naan thulirkkindren.
Naan thulirkkindren.

pachchai Vanna poove
Siriththu ponaai.
En boomi engum pachchai
Iraiththu ponaai.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Pachchai Vanna Poove expresses themes of love and longing, beautifully capturing the emotions associated with romance.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Vai Raja Vai, the song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the romantic connection between the lead characters.

Who is the singer of the song?

The song is sung by the talented Yuvan, known for his unique voice and musical style.

Who wrote the lyrics for this song?

The lyrics were penned by Karky, who is celebrated for his poetic and evocative writing.

When was the song released?

Pachchai Vanna Poove was released on December 10, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Pachchai Vanna Poove, the protagonist expresses deep affection and admiration for their beloved, reflecting the beauty of love. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and warmth, making it a perfect romantic anthem. Set against the backdrop of Vai Raja Vai, it enhances the emotional depth of the characters' journey. This enchanting number resonates with anyone who has experienced the joys of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Pachchai Vanna Poove from Vai Raja Vai is a delightful romantic number that captures the essence of love and nostalgia. With Yuvan's enchanting vocals and Karky's heartfelt lyrics, this song resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the magic of this beautiful melody that perfectly complements the film's vibrant narrative.
stanzaMeanings: Oh green flower, you have made me smile. My land has turned green everywhere.
I have seen all the troubles by looking at your face. I have pointed my finger at the problems with my head held high.
Hey girl, I am moving without stepping on the grass, after hearing your words.
Oh green flower, you have made me smile. My land has turned green everywhere.
My leg is hurt by a thorn. She is looking at the pain of the thorn. Without speaking, the tree that holds my hand says that I am being pulled away.
I am looking at your hand on a branch. If I see something there, my heart starts to wander.
I looked at your color on the heart's wall. Hey, I too asked for a wish like a tree. Why did I ask for a wish?
You have made my house a forest. In my surroundings, it has become a mess. In the mess of one, in the breath of another, in the cloud of one, you are making me win.
Your group is here, isn't it? I am standing in the rain, you came and smiled. I am everywhere, isn't it?
After the rain, I am shivering. There is something in my heart that I am blooming. I am blooming.
Oh green flower, you have made me smile. My land has turned green everywhere.
